memory:memory/2026-04-26.md:94:122.snippet: - Scripts: workspace/scripts/backup.sh, health-check.sh - Shared memory: workspace/memory/shared/ (company, projects, decisions, integrations, notion) - Agent state: workspace/state/agent-status.json - Health state: workspace/state/health-state.json - Heartbeat state: workspace/state/heartbeat-state.json ## Post-Midnight Additions (00:00–01:03 AEST) ### End-of-Day Close Rule Established - SOUL.md: non-negotiable daily close rule — journal + blog + cost report every night - Nightly cron set: 23:55 Melbourne, main session - Two journal lenses: active day (verbatim prompts) vs quiet day (platform/autonomous activity) - Blog: "While You Were Away" section added for autonomous activity days - D
